since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.10%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC -1.91% · Gold -1.52% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.10%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.10%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +12.34%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +12.34%, ANET +8.64%, SMCI +6.78%, BIDU +5.04%, AVGO +4.75%. Laggards: PANW -4.34%, RXRX -3.90%, ZS -3.88%, UPST -3.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.05% at $149.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
